comment: v0.9.4 slice A3b LIVE deploy config for examples-dev/airlock.termin. Same presentation + channel bindings as airlock.deploy.json (stub mode); the difference is the aria + evaluator computes route to the real Anthropic SDK via ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY} env-var interpolation. Use this config for the live-walkthrough phase of A3b smoke. Stub config (airlock.deploy.json) remains the cheap-iteration plumbing-verification mode.
